I

identifyYourself(Context, BluetoothService.BluetoothIdentificationCallback) - Method in class com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.service.BluetoothService
Optional method to have the device perform some identifying action, such as flashing a light or playing a sound.
identifyYourself(Context, SoftApService.SoftApIdentificationCallback, CommonErrorCallback) - Method in class com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.service.SoftApService
Optional method to have the device perform some identifying action, such as flashing a light or playing a sound.
isBleSupported(Context) - Method in class com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.service.BluetoothService
